title: More Villagers
description: A resource pack that adds new Villager types into the game like Dark Oak, Cherry, and Mushroom. (more to come soon)
body:
This resource pack adds 3/25 new villager and zombie villager variants: Dark Oak, Mushroom, and Cherry. (with more to come) The way this works is for example: if a villager or zombie villager spawns in a Dark Oak Forest then it will spawn it with a special texture same with the Mushroom and Cherry Villagers too. This will add many different villagers and zombie villagers to the game but still keep it in the original vanilla style. You can also name tag a villager one of the names below (not case sensitive) and it will give it that texture. There are also a few easter eggs that you can find hidden in this pack also ;)

## **Work In Progress**
This resource pack is a work in progress and still in Alpha and will be in full release when all villagers are finished. My plan with this pack is to add a villager variant for every single biome. Don't expect frequent updates this is just a hobby project for me and will update over time. Here is a list of all the villagers that I plan to add or have already added you can also name a villager or a zombie villager one of the names below to give it that texture.

If you have any questions, need help, or would like to suggest something you can join the 
[Discord](https://discord.gg/wu4UxsXSS7) server

**Alpha 0.1:**
- Dark Oak
- Cherry
- Mushroom

**Not Added:**
- Cold Ocean
- Warm Ocean
- Frozen Ocean
- Mountain
- Meadow
- Windswept
- Forest
- Snowy Taiga
- Birch
- Mangrove
- Beach
- Ice Spikes
- Badlands
- Deep Dark
- Dripstone
- Lush
- Nether
- Soul
- Crimson
- Warped
- Basalt
- End

**DEPENDENCIES**

Requires [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home)

# Question and Answer


<details>
<summary>Q: Is it compatible with Fresh Animations?</summary>

**A: Yes! It is fully compatible with Fresh Animations and will work perfectly fine with it.**

</details>

<details>
<summary>Q: Is it compatible with Sodium/Fabric</summary>

A: Yes however you do need to install the mods [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or else it won't work.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Q: Do I need Optifine or ETF and EMF?</summary>

A: Yes you do need one of these two mods in order for the texture pack to work.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Q: Does it work on bedrock?</summary>

A: No it does not and I do not plan to make a port for bedrock unless you guys really want me too plus I don't even know if it will work on bedrock and also please do not port it over to bedrock yourself and put it on the marketplace because one day I might try to port it over and then we might run into some issues and you could get in some trouble.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Q: Can I use this in my videos or livestreams on YouTube or Twitch?</summary>

A: Yes you can you don't have to give proper credit in the video if you don't want too but it would be nice if you could and you may want to put a link to it in the description and if anyone asks in the comments just make sure to respond with the link it would help out a ton.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Q: Can I use this in my own resource pack?</summary>

A: You can use this in your own resource pack however you are not allowed to reupload it anywhere without asking me personally and stating your intentions with it and if I approve then you must provide proper credit in the description of it meaning you must state this is a reupload and you do not own it and provide a link back to the original.

</details>

# Known Bugs
1. When a villager with a special texture leaves its biome and the textures are reloaded the texture will be reset or changed. Response: To my knowledge there is know way to fix this from happening unless you use mods but there is a way to stop it I have added it to where you can name tag a villager one of the new types and it will have that skin forever this is the only way to stop this from happening.

2. There is around a 50/50 chance that when a Baby Villager or Baby Zombie Villager spawns in a Mushroom Fields biome or name tagged "Mushroom" the mushroom hat will not appear on them. I do not know why this happens and I don't know if it can be fixed if you know anything please contact me.

### Acknowledgements
Please acknowledge that this texture pack uses multiple villager textures from across the internet but those textures aren't apart of a texture pack and if they are the project was abandoned or not updated so I combined all of them into one texture pack so think of this texture pack as giving purpose to some very cool textures that otherwise would have never been used. Here are the links to the original textures. (However in the future all the textures will be fully original and made by me completely the main reason I used these is because they were just too cool to be lost in the internet forgotten and never used)
[Cherry Villager](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cherry-grove-villagers/)
[Dark Oak Villager](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/community/posts/360047699511-Dark-Forest-Village)
[Mushroom Villager](https://minecraft.novaskin.me/skin/5489493177/Mushroom-Villager)

My Discord and YouTube to report problems or ask questions:
[Discord](https://discord.gg/wu4UxsXSS7) and [MEEP5783](https://www.youtube.com/@MEEP5783)
